temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A man in a black t-shirt is slumped in a car seat, sweating profusely. His face is contorted in distress and pain as he gasps for air, with a hand resting on his shoulder. He appears to be in the middle of a painful or traumatic memory. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately establishes a tense and emotional state for the character, suggesting he is experiencing a flashback or a moment of extreme distress.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Distressed, pained. 2) Background sounds or music: The man's heavy, panicked breathing is the dominant sound.)
(00:04-00:07) The man's distress intensifies as he continues to gasp. His eyes are wide with fear and confusion, and beads of sweat are visible on his face. He seems to be reliving a traumatic event. (Storyline: The character's escalating distress suggests the memory or situation is becoming more threatening, heightening the suspense.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Fearful, strained. 2) Background sounds or music: The sound of his panicked breathing continues.)
